001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service;
002
003import android.net.Uri;
004import androidx.room.Database;
005import androidx.room.RoomDatabase;
006import androidx.room.TypeConverter;
007import androidx.room.TypeConverters;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.CollectedFossilDao;
009import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteGridDao;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.DigSiteSquareDao;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.FossilDao;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao.UserProfileDao;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil;
017import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.UserProfile;
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.type.DigSiteSquareState;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.FossilSweeperDatabase.Converters;
020import java.time.Instant;
021
022@Database(
023    entities = {
024        Fossil.class,
025        CollectedFossil.class,
026        UserProfile.class,
027        DigSiteGrid.class,
028        DigSiteSquare.class
029    },
030    version = FossilSweeperDatabase.DATABASE_VERSION)
031@TypeConverters({Converters.class, DigSiteSquareState.class})
032public abstract class FossilSweeperDatabase extends RoomDatabase {
033
034  static final int DATABASE_VERSION = 1;
035  static final String DATABASE_NAME = "fossil-sweeper-db";
036
037  public abstract FossilDao getFossilDao();
038
039  public abstract CollectedFossilDao getCollectedFossilDao();
040
041  public abstract UserProfileDao getUserProfileDao();
042
043  public abstract DigSiteGridDao getDigSiteGridDao();
044
045  public abstract DigSiteSquareDao getDigSiteSquareDao();
046
047
048  /**
049   * Type converters for Room database to handle non-primitive types.
050   */
051  public static class Converters {
052
053    /**
054     * Converts a {@link Long} timestamp to an {@link Instant}.
055     *
056     * @param value Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch, or {@code null}.
057     * @return Corresponding {@link Instant}, or {@code null} if input is {@code null}.
058     */
059    @TypeConverter
060    public static Instant longToInstant(Long value) {
061      return (value != null) ? Instant.ofEpochMilli(value) : null;
062    }
063
064    /**
065     * Converts an {@link Instant} to a {@link Long} timestamp.
066     *
067     * @param instant {@link Instant} to convert, or {@code null}.
068     * @return Timestamp in milliseconds since epoch, or {@code null} if input is {@code null}.
069     */
070    @TypeConverter
071    public static Long instantToLong(Instant instant) {
072      return (instant != null) ? instant.toEpochMilli() : null;
073    }
074
075    /**
076     * Converts a {@link String} to a {@link Uri}.
077     *
078     * @param value String representation of URI, or {@code null}.
079     * @return Parsed {@link Uri}, or {@code null} if input is {@code null}.
080     */
081    @TypeConverter
082    public static Uri stringToUri(String value) {
083      return (value != null) ? Uri.parse(value) : null;
084    }
085
086    /**
087     * Converts a {@link Uri} to a {@link String}.
088     *
089     * @param uri {@link Uri} to convert, or {@code null}.
090     * @return String representation of URI, or {@code null} if input is {@code null}.
091     */
092    @TypeConverter
093    public static String uriToString(Uri uri) {
094      return (uri != null) ? uri.toString() : null;
095    }
096
097  }
098}
